questions.question: Describe the main components of electronic waste and how they contribute to environmental pollution. (10 marks)
A person generates 5 kg of e-waste per day. If this rate of generation continues for a year, how much e-waste will be generated in a year? (5 marks)
What are some strategies that can be implemented to reduce the composition of municipal solid waste and minimize the generation of e-waste? (15 marks)
